---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What's the situation where you wished the skill did something it doesn't? Concrete example is 10x more useful than a general "it should be smarter". -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like to happen? Keep scope in mind — see CONTRIBUTING.md for what's in / out of scope for this project. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways you thought about solving this. Why did they not work as well? -->

## Would this be a:

- [ ] Change to SKILL.md (prompting / dispatch rules / decision logic)
- [ ] New persona in `personas/`
- [ ] New script in `scripts/`
- [ ] Documentation change
- [ ] CI / tooling change
- [ ] Something else (please describe)

## Willing to PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this myself
- [ ] No, just raising the idea
